narrative.who: 甲（遛狗的人）· 乙（邻居，也带着宠物）
narrative.how: 一边遛狗一边和邻居聊起各自的宠物
narrative.method: 遇见对方的动物、互动喂食、聊起动物的习性、道别离开
narrative.event: 甲新养的小狗第一次出门，有点紧张

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning! What a good day.
turns.zh: 早上好！天气真好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, your dog is new, is it?
turns.zh: 对哦，你的狗是新来的？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, his first time out. He is not quite solid.
turns.zh: 是的，它第一次出门。有点不稳。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My cat is old and slow. See her?
turns.zh: 我的猫又老又慢。看见它了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She is beautiful. What is her name?
turns.zh: 它真漂亮。叫什么名字？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: But she is soft, not sharp.
turns.zh: 但它很温柔，不凶。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My dog has no name. Any ideas?
turns.zh: 我的狗还没名字。有什么建议吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What about 'Bright'? For this clear day.
turns.zh: 也许叫‘明亮’？为了这晴朗的一天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good name. I will keep it.
turns.zh: 好名字。我记下了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let them get used to one another.
turns.zh: 让它们彼此熟悉一下吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is shaking a bit. Does your cat ever get fear?
turns.zh: 它有点发抖。你的猫也会害怕吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not much. She has seen it all.
turns.zh: 不太会。它什么都见过了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He may be like that one day.
turns.zh: 也许有一天它也会那样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Give him time. He is young.
turns.zh: 给它点时间。它还小。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. I will take him out more.
turns.zh: 也是。我会多带它出来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have you got any food for them?
turns.zh: 你带吃的了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have some dry meat bits. Would you like some?
turns.zh: 带了点肉干，要试试吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He would like that. He is a bit in need of food.
turns.zh: 它应该会喜欢。它有点饿了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here, put a bit on your hand.
turns.zh: 来，放一点在手心上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He took it! That is a good sign.
turns.zh: 它吃了！好兆头。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My cat only has food after a long smell.
turns.zh: 我家猫闻半天才吃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Dogs are not so detailed. They take it in.
turns.zh: 狗没那么多讲究，直接吞。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. But he is still learning to be strong.
turns.zh: 是啊。不过它还在学勇敢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Give him water too. The sun is warm.
turns.zh: 也给它喝点水。太阳挺暖的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I have a small bowl here.
turns.zh: 好主意。我带了小碗。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here, put some water in the bowl.
turns.zh: 来，倒点水在碗里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is drinking now. That is good.
turns.zh: 它在喝了，挺好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My cat will only take water that is moving.
turns.zh: 我家猫只喝流动的水。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh! That cat is hard to please.
turns.zh: 哦！这猫还挺难伺候。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, he will not touch still water.
turns.zh: 是啊，静水它不碰。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your dog is getting used to the place.
turns.zh: 你的狗开始适应这儿了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He even gave my cat a look just now.
turns.zh: 它刚才还瞅了我家猫一眼。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Cats are not so quick to make friends.
turns.zh: 猫交朋友可没那么快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: True. But they may get on in time.
turns.zh: 没错，但时间长了也许能处。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope so. It would be a sweet thing.
turns.zh: 希望如此，那多好啊。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let them be a little longer?
turns.zh: 要不让它们再待会儿？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I have some cheese bits.
turns.zh: 好主意，我这儿有点奶酪粒。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My dog takes any food, but that cat is hard to please.
turns.zh: 我家狗什么都吃，那猫可真挑。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He only takes the soft bits. Hard food is no good.
turns.zh: 它只吃软的，硬的一点不碰。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Every animal has its own way.
turns.zh: 有道理，每个动物都有自己的脾气。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My dog will take anything, even grass.
turns.zh: 我家狗什么都吃，连草都啃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a laugh. Does he get ill?
turns.zh: 那倒有趣。它不会生病吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not so far. But he did take a stone.
turns.zh: 目前还没有。不过它吃过石头。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A stone? That is not good for his body.
turns.zh: 石头？那对身体可不好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I took it from his mouth in time.
turns.zh: 我及时从它嘴里拿出来了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You were quick. My cat is slow and soft.
turns.zh: 你反应快。我家猫又慢又温和。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Cats are wise. Dogs are happy simple ones.
turns.zh: 猫聪明，狗是快乐的简单家伙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good way to put it.
turns.zh: 说得真好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Give them a bit more time?
turns.zh: 再让它们多待一会儿？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, let them get used to one another.
turns.zh: 好，让它们慢慢熟悉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have some food for them.
turns.zh: 我带了点吃的给它们。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is it? My dog is hard to please.
turns.zh: 是什么？我家狗很难伺候。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Small bits of meat. Your dog may like them.
turns.zh: 小肉块。你家狗可能会喜欢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He is looking at your hand now.
turns.zh: 它现在正盯着你的手看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here you go, little one. Take it slow.
turns.zh: 来，小家伙。慢慢吃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He took it. That is a good sign.
turns.zh: 它吃了。这是个好兆头。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My cat will only take food if I put it on the floor first.
turns.zh: 我家猫非得我先放地上才肯吃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Cats are like that. They have their own way.
turns.zh: 猫就那样。它们有自己的规矩。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your dog is more at rest now.
turns.zh: 你家狗现在放松多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the food and your cat helped.
turns.zh: 是啊，食物和你家猫帮了忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My cat is watching a bird up there.
turns.zh: 我家猫在看上面那只鸟。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Your dog is looking at the bird too.
turns.zh: 你家狗也在看那只鸟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He has not seen a bird so near before.
turns.zh: 它以前没这么近看过鸟。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My cat will watch birds for hours.
turns.zh: 我家猫能看鸟看几个小时。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Does she ever make an attempt to get them?
turns.zh: 它有没有试过抓它们？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, she only looks. She is not after anything.
turns.zh: 没有，它只是看。它不追捕任何东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your dog has more nerve now.
turns.zh: 你家狗现在胆子大了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, he is walking with his tail up.
turns.zh: 是啊，它尾巴翘起来走了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My cat is going to the grass.
turns.zh: 我家猫要去草地上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let them have a little play.
turns.zh: 让它们玩一会儿吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your cat seems quite at peace.
turns.zh: 你家猫看起来挺自在的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: She is. The garden is her place.
turns.zh: 是啊，它把整个花园当自己家了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My dog is still not happy with this place.
turns.zh: 我家狗还是不太喜欢这个地方。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Give him time. He will get used to it.
turns.zh: 给它点时间，它会习惯的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope so. He would not take water from my hand.
turns.zh: 希望如此吧。它连我手上的水都不肯喝。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here, let me put some in this little thing.
turns.zh: 来，我倒一点在这个小东西里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is very kind of you. He is looking at it now.
turns.zh: 你真好。它现在在看了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He will come to it when he is ready.
turns.zh: 等它准备好了就会过来喝的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He took a drink! That is a good sign.
turns.zh: 它喝了一口！好兆头。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See? Animals have their own way of doing things.
turns.zh: 看吧？动物有自己的行事方式。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My cat is watching a bird in that tree.
turns.zh: 我家的猫在看那棵树上的鸟。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: She does that for hours. Not moving.
turns.zh: 它能看几个小时，一动不动。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My dog would make a noise at it right away.
turns.zh: 我家的狗会立刻叫起来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Cats go quiet when they get food. Dogs make a noise.
turns.zh: 猫抓食物时不出声，狗会吵闹。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. He even made noise at his own face in a glass.
turns.zh: 没错，它甚至对着镜子里的自己叫。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a laugh. My cat has no care for glass.
turns.zh: 真逗。我家猫才不在乎镜子呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is more ready now. See his tail?
turns.zh: 它现在胆子大了点。看它的尾巴？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is up a bit. He is feeling better.
turns.zh: 嗯，翘起来一点了。它感觉好多了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your cat has no fear of him at all.
turns.zh: 你家猫根本不怕它。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, she is used to dogs. She will walk away if she has had enough.
turns.zh: 不怕，它习惯狗了。受够了就会走开。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I had better go. It is time for the meal.
turns.zh: 我得走了，该吃饭了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will get going too. He needs a rest.
turns.zh: 好，我也该走了。它需要休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us do this again one week from now?
turns.zh: 下周还一起遛吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that would be good. Same time?
turns.zh: 好啊，挺好的。同一时间？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the first day of the week in the morning is best for me.
turns.zh: 嗯，周日早上我最方便。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep walking. be safe of him.
turns.zh: 继续走。照顾好它。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. Give her a soft touch for me.
turns.zh: 你也是。替我轻轻摸摸它。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. get some rest.
turns.zh: 我会的。休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Look. He is walking better now.
turns.zh: 看，它现在走得好些了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, he is getting used to it. Go slow.
turns.zh: 对，它在适应了。慢慢走。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, time to go. He will be tired after this.
turns.zh: 好了，该走了。它走完这趟会累的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, first walks are hard work. Rest now.
turns.zh: 是的，第一次散步不容易。休息吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, same place, same time. I will be here.
turns.zh: 嗯，老地方，老时间。我会来的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Give him a rest when you get back.
turns.zh: 好的。回去让它歇会儿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. He will get some rest tonight, I am certain.
turns.zh: 我会的。我确定它今晚会休息得很好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh yes. My cat will sleep on my bed as ever.
turns.zh: 哈，是啊。我家猫照旧睡我床上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. They keep us company.
turns.zh: 那挺好。它们陪着我们。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: True. Well then, I will go this way.
turns.zh: 没错。那行，我走这边了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And I will go that way. Have a good rest of the day.
turns.zh: 我走那边。周末愉快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. See you after this week.
turns.zh: 你也是。下周见。

storyBlurb: 周日上午公园里，甲的新狗第一次出门紧张发抖，乙的宠物猫却淡定围观。两人喂食互动间，聊起动物习性，最后道别离开。
storyScript:
【开场·遇见动物】周日上午的阳光暖洋洋地洒在公园的草坪上，甲牵着一条毛茸茸的小狗，小狗四腿微微打颤，尾巴夹在腿间，对周围的一切充满警惕。不远处，乙正蹲在地上，面前一只虎斑猫慵懒地舔着爪子，偶尔抬头瞥一眼新来的小家伙。两人目光相遇，乙笑着招手，甲牵着小狗慢慢走近。小狗在猫面前停下，鼻子抽动，却不敢上前，猫则漫不经心地甩了甩尾巴。

【进行·互动喂食】乙从口袋里掏出一小袋冻干，倒了几粒在掌心，先喂给自家猫，猫优雅地叼走一块。乙又朝小狗伸出手，小狗犹豫着，甲轻声鼓励，它终于凑上前，小心地舔走一粒。乙笑着说，猫和狗吃东西的习惯真不一样，猫总是先闻半天，狗却直接吞。甲点头，说小狗第一次出门，什么都怕，连喝水都要哄。乙递过一个小碗，甲倒了些水，小狗低头喝起来，猫则跳到旁边的长椅上，居高临下地看着。

【进行·聊习性】两人聊起动物的趣事，乙说自家猫最爱在窗台上看鸟，一看就是一下午，但真见到鸟又懒得动。甲说小狗昨晚啃坏了拖鞋，还对着镜子里的自己狂吠。乙哈哈大笑，说动物各有各的脾气，猫独立，狗黏人，但都让人牵肠挂肚。阳光渐暖，小狗放松了些，开始试探着嗅猫的尾巴，猫不耐烦地走开，小狗又追上去，两人看着这一幕，会心一笑。

【收束·告别离开】乙看了看手表，说该回家做午饭了。甲也拉起狗绳，小狗似乎有些依依不舍，回头看了猫一眼。乙抱起猫，挥手道别，说下次再一起遛。甲牵着狗慢慢走远，小狗的脚步比来时稳当多了，尾巴也微微翘起。阳光依旧温暖，公园里留下一串浅浅的脚印。
